heading: Contracting with shipyards controlled by a foreign adversary country: prohibition
label: 8679a Contracting with shipyards controlled by a foreign adversary country: prohibition
text: The Secretary of Defense may not enter into any contract or other agreement with a shipyard determined by the Secretary of Defense to be under the ownership, control, or influence of a covered nation, as defined in .section 4872(f) of this title
notes: Amendments2025— substituted “a covered nation, as defined in ” for “a foreign adversary country (as defined in , United States Code)” in text.Pub. L. 119–60section 4872(f) of this titlesection 4872(d)(2) of title 10
